meaning: v.打鼾,打着鼾渡过(时间)n.打鼾,鼾声
examples: Uncle Arthur, after a loud snore, woke suddenly.
People with stuffy or blocked noses often snore.
As the night deepened, Huck began to nod, and presently to snore.
Good Night Stop Snore Mouthwash - claims its combination of essential oils will help stop snoring.
Y-Snore Nose Drops, a homeopathic product - experts said there was insufficient evidence it worked.
